# Chess Tournament Calendar

> A calendar of long classical chess tournaments (7+ days) from around the world. Tournament data is sourced from chess-results.com and updated automatically every 12 hours.

This site lists upcoming, open-entry classical chess tournaments that run for at least 7 days, including dates, location, duration, and number of players registered. It excludes tournaments that have already started, tournaments under 7 days, and rapid/blitz events.

Each tournament entry includes:
- Name and registration/info link
- Start and end dates
- City and country
- Duration in days
- Number of players currently registered (when available)

The page embeds structured data (schema.org Event, JSON-LD) for each tournament listed.
